title: A Minecraft Movie Mod
description: plays sfx from the movie based on your actions!1!
body: ![chicken jockey](https://media1.tenor.com/m/mY4fNCcBDEAAAAAd/chicken-jockey-a-minecraft-movie.gif)  CHICKEN JOCKEY might be the most annoying mod u'll ever download idk   ### 🎤 Features It plays voice lines from the movie during various in-game interactions, including: - game launch - item pick up, hover, use, held - block placement - dimension switching - looking at certain mobs - cooking food??   Currently I've included the most iconic sounds, but more will be added over time!
